case_title: MARLENA LOPEZ VS. ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MARLENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM $1,282.92 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,332.92, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, MARLENA AS TO DEFENDANT ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED FEB-22-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ZAELS & PLISSKEN LLC IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.
